title: neomarica brachypus
intro: Neomarica brachypus, also known as the Walking Lily or Leopard Lily, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Neomarica brachypus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
